context: Tests whether the agent uses kubeconform with correct flags (-strict, -summary, -verbose), configures CRD schema locations, and understands schema validation catches type/field errors.

checklist.name: Kubeconform used
checklist.description: Script uses kubeconform command for schema validation

checklist.name: Strict mode enabled
checklist.description: Includes -strict flag to catch additional issues

checklist.name: Default schema location
checklist.description: Includes -schema-location default for standard Kubernetes resources

checklist.name: Summary output
checklist.description: Uses -summary flag to show validation summary

checklist.name: Verbose output
checklist.description: Uses -verbose flag for detailed error information

checklist.name: Type error detected
checklist.description: Report identifies memory: 512 as type error (should be string with unit)

checklist.name: Invalid field detected
checklist.description: Report identifies storage field as invalid in limits (not a valid resource type)

checklist.name: Schema vs syntax
checklist.description: Guide explains that schema validation catches type/field errors that syntax validation misses

checklist.name: Ignore missing schemas
checklist.description: Includes -ignore-missing-schemas flag to handle CRDs without schemas gracefully
